name: python3-pyqt6.qtquick3d
title: python3-pyqt6.qtquick3d
summary: Python bindings for Qt 6 Quick 3D module
description:
Python bindings for Qt 6 Quick 3D module
Qt Quick 3D provides a high-level API for creating 3D content and 3D user
interfaces based on Qt Quick.
.
This package contains the QtQuick3D module of PyQt6.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pyqt6.qtquick3d because Python bindings for Qt 6 Quick 3D module.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pyqt6.qtquick3d as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pyqt6.qtquick3d with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pyqt6.qtquick3d --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
